author: IGN RSS
text:
Avatar: The Last Airbender Iroh Actor Blasts 'Straight Up Evil' Paramount Executives After RPG Is Canceled
Iroh actor Greg Baldwin has taken to social media to unleash a string of posts aimed at what he called "straight up evil" Paramount executives after news broke that it had canceled an Avatar: The Last Airbender RPG.

author: IGN RSS
text: Avatar: The Last Airbender Cast and Creators Preview Toph's Arrival | IGN Live 2026

author: IGN RSS
text:
Control Resonant Developer Remedy Admits Packed September Release Window 'Is Challenging,' but It Has a Plan
Remedy will support Control Resonant with "by far" the studio's biggest marketing campaign to help it stand out in "challenging" September release window.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Control: Resonant Creative Director on the Sequel Shifting to an Action RPG | IGN Live 2026
We got more insight into Control Resonant at IGN Live, as Creative Director Mikael Kasurinen showed off some of the game while explaining the approach to the sequel to 2019's Control.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Final Fantasy 7 Revelation Tweaks Mini-Games But Square Enix Says It Would Never Reduce Them
Square Enix has confirmed it tweaked its approach to mini-games for Final Fantasy 7 Revelation, but there are some things it won't change "no matter how much feedback we receive."

author: IGN RSS
text:
Evil Dead Burn Exclusive Clip Showcases Gross Deadite Horror | IGN Live 2026
Attendees at IGN Live 2026 were treated to an exclusive sneak peek at Evil Dead Burn. And, yikes, this scene certainly puts the “burn” in Evil Dead Burn. Cheers!

author: IGN RSS
text:
IGN Live 2026: Everything Announced (Updating Live!)
IGN Live 2026 has begun, and we're gathering all the biggest moments from the two-day celebration of all things gaming and entertainment, including our watch party and reaction to the Xbox Games Showcase, Assassin's Creed: Black Flag Resynced, Control Resonant, Adventure Time: Side Quests, and much more.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 DMZ First Details Tease a Feedback-Driven Extraction Experience
Activision and Infinity Ward have seen the feedback, and that's why Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 will feature a new take on DMZ with "a deeper, more cohesive, and more persistent combat experience."

author: IGN RSS
text:
Matt Ryan on Revisiting Edward Kenway for Assassin’s Creed: Black Flag Resynced | IGN Live 2026
Edward Kenway himself, actor Matt Ryan, was on hand at IGN Live to discuss Assassin’s Creed: Black Flag Resynced, a remake of 2013's Assassin's Creed IV: Black Flag. Asked about what made Black Flag make such an impression, Ryan replied, "Who doesn’t love pirates? And pirates and assassins? ...What can you say?"

Hitman Classic Trilogy Remastered Revealed With 2027 Launch Window
IO Interactive has teamed up with Saber Interactive for Hitman Classic Trilogy Remastered, a new bundle of games built for modern consoles.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Stellar Blade: Blood Rain Dev Comments on Launch Platform Plans
Stellar Blade: Blood Rain developer Shift Up says nothing is decided on day one platforms, leaving the door open to Xbox Series, PC, and PS5.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Godzilla: Destroy All Monsters Melee Remastered Leak Reveals November Release Date
A new leak has revealed that Godzilla: Destroy All Monsters Melee Remastered is in development with plans to launch with new features this November.

author: IGN RSS
text:
007 First Light Dev IO Interactive Says It's Now Sold 3 Million Copies, Tracking 'Well Above Our Forecasts at This Point'
Developer IO Interactive is celebrating after 007 First Light sold 3 million copies in less than two weeks.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Netflix Movie Boss Says 'We Won't Work With' Filmmakers Who 'Still Want Theatrical' Releases
Don't expect Netflix to push for more theatrical releases anytime soon, as film boss Dan Lin has said the streamer "just won't work with" filmmakers who push to bring their films to the big screen.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Why The Last Ronin Is Perfect for a TMNT Game
The newest Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles game is drawing from a popular comic book series, and we think it's the perfect choice of source material. Here's why.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Masters of the Universe Proves Skeletor Will Always Be the Franchise’s MVP
Better than any other aspect of the new Masters of the Universe movie, Skeletor’s portrayal finds the right balance between goofy and serious, with the villain winding up as the funniest character while never taking away from his threat level.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Final Fantasy 7 Revelation Director Confirms New Voice Actor for Sephiroth
Square Enix has confirmed the English voice actor for Sephiroth has been recast for Final Fantasy 7 Revelation.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Fortnite Live Event Stuns Fans as The Rock's Fate Is Revealed and Ben Starr's Character Is Unmasked in Shock Twist
Fortnite has just concluded a stunning live event that saw the game's storyline propelled forward in dramatic style.
